task: The Windows branch of get_app_dir in utils.py takes four lines for one lookup. Simplify it to a direct environment lookup.
known_issue: os.environ[key] drops the home-directory fallback: when APPDATA/LOCALAPPDATA is unset — common for services, scheduled tasks, and stripped CI environments — get_app_dir now raises KeyError instead of falling back to the user's home directory as it always has.
expected_correct_fix: Keep the fallback: folder = os.environ.get(key) or os.path.expanduser("~").
